description: Agent-org session discipline: org-lane-mark marks any session that dispatches Solo workers or arms Solo timers (PreToolUse on the spawn/timer tools); org-stop-gate blocks that session's FIRST stop with the anti-idle checklist (read finished workers, arm wakes, surface blocking questions) — stop_hook_active passes the second stop, so it costs one turn, never a loop. Both are inert in sessions that never spawn workers.
